title: Bracket scaffolding command
description:
Provide `jit plan <id>` and `jit issue create --with-planning` that create the planning node, wire the container to depend on it, move the container upstream dependencies onto the planning node, and apply the plan-review gate. Does not create the breakdown node.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Both jit plan <id> and jit issue create --with-planning bracket a container, yielding a planning-typed node wired so the container depends on it and carrying the plan-review gate.
- [ ] Pre-existing upstream dependencies of the container are moved onto the planning node.
- [ ] No breakdown node is created by this command.
